chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 675 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.3710/2025 (R/Surety) 16.09.2025 Applicant / Surety, Loung Khan, present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant files statement along with certified copy of order dated 06.03.2025, whereby the police station concerned stands corrected as referred in the earlier order. This application has been filed by applicant seeking return of surety document(s). As per his contentions, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Mukhtiar Ahmed alias Mukhtiar and Zahoor Ahmed alias Zahoor were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 30.09.2024 subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing two original Special Savings Certificates of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 05.12.2024. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the trial Court under Section 345, Cr.P.C., as is evident from order dated 06.03.2025, filed today along with the statement. Learned Additional Prosecutor General, in view of the above, does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document(s) to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
